  Details:
  PR4 of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction. Ported AgroverseShopShippingRatesController + ShippingCalculatorService to Python: EasyPost USPS-only rate calc (parcel+shipment create, cheapest-first, shop shipping_rate_data shape) and the GET /agroverse_shop/shipping_rates endpoint (weightOz + shippingAddress JSON, SF warehouse origin, default destination, shop-formatted rates). EasyPost key read from env (not hardcoded) and provisioned server-side into the box .env from Rails prod config so it never entered logs. 5 mocked unit tests (17 total) pass. Deployed to seni_ror_new:8010 and verified EXACT PARITY against the live Rails endpoint for a real address (identical USPS rates, ids, amounts, delivery days). Gate off: real path still on Rails.
